gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/372)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/372)
text: اطْوُوا ثِيَابَكُمْ بِاللَّيْلِ فَإِنَّهَا إِذَا كَانَتْ مَنْشُورَةً لَبِسَهَا الشَّيْطَانُ بِاللَّيْلِ .

en.hubeali: Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Muhammad Bin Bakr, from Zakariyya Al Momin, from the one who narrated it,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Fold your clothes at night, for when these are displayed, the Satan<sup>la</sup> wears it at night’.
en.sarwar: 11. Sahl ibn Ziyad has narrated from Muhammad ibn Bakr from Zakariya al-Mu’min’ from those who narrated to him who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Fold your clothes for the night because Satan wears during the night the spread out clothes.’”
